note: Wider context — refreshed alongside the section briefings.

items.title: World briefing: DRC Ebola spread, US–China trade deals, Bolivia crisis
items.summary: Three to know: a rare Ebola variant spreading in eastern Congo (134 deaths, 500+ cases), US–China trade deals from the May 15 summit, political unrest in Bolivia.

items.title: Toronto roundup: Metrolinx delay, housing project losses, mini pitch opens
items.summary: Richmond Hill subway extension delayed, 26 affordable housing projects lose city benefits, and a new Soccer For All mini pitch opens in Scarborough.

items.title: Algeria eliminates trachoma; US renewables overtake gas
items.summary: Algeria becomes the latest country to eliminate trachoma as a public health problem. US renewables produced 35% of electricity in March vs gas at 34%.
